reviews.review_title: Good game but it has problems
reviews.review_description:
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5gyJucIkAh-36S0wI2nsviPIIoIFqB6Y&si=z4m_ilh10qoAsabe

Hi there! If you’re reading this, please be aware that there are many fake owners and people claiming to be moderators or staff of Just Monkin. Most of them are not legit.

I’m the co-owner, and unlike the others, I can actually prove it. You can find the proof by joining our official Discord server—just click the link in the game’s description or visit the Just Monkin website.

If you don’t have Discord, no worries! Head over to my YouTube channel, Cosmo O9, and watch the videos where I expose the fake Just Monkin owners.

Right now, the real owner Gooley and I are working on a Just Monkin remake. Once it’s finished, it’ll launch with an entirely new Meta page.

Thanks for being part of the community!

— Cosmo O9

I was notthenugget and I was wearing the owner hat from a glitch so yeh I’m not a mod or an admin but if your reading this i would be really grateful if I could have vent access it would be my first time being a sorta mod? But your game is awesome and maybe you could make hats for the different roles maybe anyways thanks for reading
5/5 stars W

So, im sure some peope have seen me. Im bluudud, and in my opinion, the staff is nice, and always active. But you need to add barriers so people can't get outside the map. Thanks for reading (if you read this)

reviews.review_title: Glitches and believe I’m co owner
reviews.review_description:
Hey, the free owner glitch will be patched soon! You get the stuff we will ban you, just a warning. I’m FireVR, you may see me in game say hi! The owner is making me custom co owner items so right now I don’t have any custom items. Sorry for any confusion. Also, please listen to rules, you may think your cool with your anti cheat mod but rlly your not. It’s annoying and ruins the game for others. 
Thanks, 
FireVR 🔥🔥🔥
